nasb.text: Your maidservant had two sons, but the two of them struggled together in the field, and there was no one to separate them, so one struck the other and killed him.

esv.text: And your servant had two sons, and they quarreled with one another in the field. There was no one to separate them, and one struck the other and killed him.

cnv.text: 婢女有兩個兒子；有一天，他們兩人在田裡打架，當時沒有人勸開他們，這個就擊打那個，竟把他打死了。

ccb.text: 我本来有两个儿子，有一次他们在田间发生争执，当时没有人劝解，其中一个儿子被打死了。
